# Jane Doe

Joined Pacific in 2022 as a senior consultant in the data practice. Took on the Acme account-lead role in Q2 2024 after the original engagement partner stepped back. Background: previously a staff data engineer at a fintech; Snowflake and dbt are her strongest tools.
